mapper.select: select * from `exam_record` where exam_id = #{examId} and student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: insert into `exam_record`(exam_id, student_id, score, submit_time, status, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{score}, #{submitTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
